192:             line_variant_id_to_total_qty[line.variant_id] += line.quantity

194:         number_of_variants = len(line_variant_id_to_total_qty)
195:         warehouses_for_channel = self.for_channel(channel_id)
196: 
197:         # Fetch the stocks for the variants in the order
198:         stocks_qs = (
199:             Stock.objects.using(self.db)
200:             .filter(Exists(lines_qs.filter(variant_id=OuterRef("product_variant_id"))))
201:             .annotate_available_quantity()
202:         )
203: 
204:         stock_ids = []
205:         variant_id_to_total_stock_qty: dict[int | None, int] = defaultdict(int)
206:         # Filter out the stocks that have enough quantity to fulfill the order
207:         # Prepare the mapping of variant_id to the sum of total available quantity of
208:         # the given variant from all stocks
209:         for stock in stocks_qs:
210:             if (
211:                 stock.available_quantity
212:                 >= line_variant_id_to_total_qty[stock.product_variant_id]
213:             ):
214:                 stock_ids.append(stock.id)
215:             variant_id_to_total_stock_qty[stock.product_variant_id] += (
216:                 stock.available_quantity
217:             )
218: 
219:         if stock_ids:
220:             # Find out warehouses that can cover the order from a single warehouse
221:             stocks = Stock.objects.filter(id__in=stock_ids)
222:             warehouses = warehouses_for_channel._cc_points_for_stocks(stocks).only("id")
223:             warehouse_ids = []
224:             for warehouse in warehouses:
225:                 if warehouse.stock_set.count() == number_of_variants:
226:                     warehouse_ids.append(warehouse.id)
227: 
228:             # if there is any valid local warehouse it means that it is possible
229:             # to ship products to any warehouse with `all warehouses` option
230:             if warehouse_ids:
231:                 return warehouses_for_channel.filter(
232:                     Q(id__in=warehouse_ids)
233:                     | Q(
234:                         click_and_collect_option=warehouse_cc_option_enum.ALL_WAREHOUSES
235:                     )
236:                 )
237: 
238:         # Check if the ordered line quantities can be fulfilled using stock from
239:         # different warehouses.
240:         if len(variant_id_to_total_stock_qty) == number_of_variants and all(
241:             variant_id_to_total_stock_qty[variant_id] >= variant_total_qty
242:             for variant_id, variant_total_qty in line_variant_id_to_total_qty.items()
243:         ):
244:             return warehouses_for_channel.filter(
245:                 click_and_collect_option=warehouse_cc_option_enum.ALL_WAREHOUSES
246:             )
247:         return self.none()

359:     def for_channel_and_click_and_collect(self, channel_slug: str):
360:         """Return the stocks for a given channel for a click and collect.
361: 
362:         The click and collect warehouses don't have to be assigned to the shipping zones
363:         so all stocks for a given channel are returned.
364:         """
365:         WarehouseChannel = Channel.warehouses.through
366: 
367:         channels = Channel.objects.filter(slug=channel_slug).values("pk")
368: 
369:         warehouse_channels = WarehouseChannel.objects.filter(
370:             Exists(channels.filter(pk=OuterRef("channel_id")))
371:         ).values("warehouse_id")
372: 
373:         return self.select_related("product_variant").filter(
374:             Exists(warehouse_channels.filter(warehouse_id=OuterRef("warehouse_id")))
375:         )

377:     def for_channel_and_country(
378:         self,
379:         channel_slug: str,
380:         country_code: str | None = None,
381:         include_cc_warehouses: bool = False,
382:     ):
383:         """Get stocks for given channel and country_code.
384: 
385:         The returned stocks, must be in warehouse that is available in provided channel
386:         and in the shipping zone that is available in the given channel and country.
387:         When the country_code is not provided or include_cc_warehouses is set to True,
388:         also the stocks from collection point warehouses allowed in given channel are
389:         returned.
390:         """
391:         ShippingZoneChannel = Channel.shipping_zones.through
392:         WarehouseShippingZone = ShippingZone.warehouses.through
393:         WarehouseChannel = Channel.warehouses.through
394: 
395:         channels = Channel.objects.filter(slug=channel_slug).values("pk")
396: 
397:         shipping_zone_channels = ShippingZoneChannel.objects.filter(
398:             Exists(channels.filter(pk=OuterRef("channel_id")))
399:         )
400:         warehouse_channels = WarehouseChannel.objects.filter(
401:             Exists(channels.filter(pk=OuterRef("channel_id")))
402:         ).values("warehouse_id")
403: 
404:         cc_warehouses = Warehouse.objects.none()
405:         if country_code:
406:             shipping_zones = ShippingZone.objects.filter(
407:                 countries__contains=country_code
408:             ).values("pk")
409:             shipping_zone_channels = shipping_zone_channels.filter(
410:                 Exists(shipping_zones.filter(pk=OuterRef("shippingzone_id")))
411:             )
412:         if not country_code or include_cc_warehouses:
413:             # when the country code is not provided we should also include
414:             # the collection point warehouses
415:             cc_warehouses = Warehouse.objects.filter(
416:                 Exists(warehouse_channels.filter(warehouse_id=OuterRef("id"))),
417:                 click_and_collect_option__in=[
418:                     WarehouseClickAndCollectOption.LOCAL_STOCK,
419:                     WarehouseClickAndCollectOption.ALL_WAREHOUSES,
420:                 ],
421:             )
422: 
423:         shipping_zone_channels.values("shippingzone_id")
424: 
425:         warehouse_shipping_zones = WarehouseShippingZone.objects.filter(
426:             Exists(
427:                 shipping_zone_channels.filter(
428:                     shippingzone_id=OuterRef("shippingzone_id")
429:                 )
430:             ),
431:             Exists(warehouse_channels.filter(warehouse_id=OuterRef("warehouse_id"))),
432:         ).values("warehouse_id")
433:         return self.select_related("product_variant").filter(
434:             Exists(
435:                 warehouse_shipping_zones.filter(warehouse_id=OuterRef("warehouse_id"))
436:             )
437:             | Exists(cc_warehouses.filter(id=OuterRef("warehouse_id")))
438:         )

158:     def sort_by_attribute(self, attribute_pk: int | str, descending: bool = False):
159:         """Sort a query set by the values of the given product attribute.
160: 
161:         :param attribute_pk: The database ID (must be a numeric) of the attribute
162:                              to sort by.
163:         :param descending: The sorting direction.
164:         """
165:         from ..attribute.models import (
166:             AssignedProductAttributeValue,
167:             AttributeProduct,
168:             AttributeValue,
169:         )
170: 
171:         qs: models.QuerySet = self
172:         # If the passed attribute ID is valid, execute the sorting
173:         if not (isinstance(attribute_pk, int) or attribute_pk.isnumeric()):
174:             return qs.annotate(
175:                 concatenated_values_order=Value(
176:                     None, output_field=models.IntegerField()
177:                 ),
178:                 concatenated_values=Value(None, output_field=models.CharField()),
179:             )
180: 
181:         qs = qs.annotate(
182:             # Implicit `GROUP BY` required for the `StringAgg` aggregation
183:             grouped_ids=Count("id"),
184:             # String aggregation of the attribute's values to efficiently sort them
185:             concatenated_values=Case(
186:                 # If the product has no association data but has
187:                 # the given attribute associated to its product type,
188:                 # then consider the concatenated values as empty (non-null).
189:                 When(
190:                     Exists(
191:                         AttributeProduct.objects.using(self.db).filter(
192:                             product_type_id=OuterRef("product_type_id"),
193:                             attribute_id=attribute_pk,
194:                         )
195:                     )
196:                     & ~Exists(
197:                         AssignedProductAttributeValue.objects.using(self.db).filter(
198:                             product_id=OuterRef("id"), value__attribute_id=attribute_pk
199:                         )
200:                     ),
201:                     then=Value(""),
202:                 ),
203:                 default=StringAgg(
204:                     F("attributevalues__value__name"),
205:                     filter=Q(attributevalues__value__attribute_id=attribute_pk),
206:                     delimiter=",",
207:                     ordering=(
208:                         [
209:                             f"attributevalues__value__{field_name}"
210:                             for field_name in AttributeValue._meta.ordering or []
211:                         ]
212:                     ),
213:                 ),
214:                 output_field=models.CharField(),
215:             ),
216:             concatenated_values_order=Case(
217:                 # Make the products having no such attribute be last in the sorting
218:                 When(concatenated_values=None, then=2),
219:                 # Put the products having an empty attribute value at the bottom of
220:                 # the other products.
221:                 When(concatenated_values="", then=1),
222:                 # Put the products having an attribute value to be always at the top
223:                 default=0,
224:                 output_field=models.IntegerField(),
225:             ),
226:         )
227: 
228:         # Sort by concatenated_values_order then
229:         # Sort each group of products (0, 1, 2, ...) per attribute values
230:         # Sort each group of products by name,
231:         # if they have the same values or not values
232:         ordering = "-" if descending else ""
233:         return qs.order_by(
234:             f"{ordering}concatenated_values_order",
235:             f"{ordering}concatenated_values",
236:             f"{ordering}name",
237:         )

67:         .filter(Exists(products.filter(id=OuterRef("product_id"))))
68:         .prefetch_related("channel")
69:     )

73:     for product_channel_listing in product_channel_listings:

75:         channel_id = product_channel_listing.channel_id
76:         variant_listings = product_to_variant_listings_per_channel_map[product_id][
77:             channel_id
78:         ]

107:             product_channel_listing.discounted_price_amount = (

254: def _get_discounted_variants_prices_for_promotions(
255:     variant_listings: list[ProductVariantChannelListing],
256:     rules_info_per_variant: dict[int, list[PromotionRuleInfo]],
257:     channel: Channel,
258:     variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map: dict,
259: ) -> tuple[
260:     list[Money],
261:     list[ProductVariantChannelListing],
262:     list[VariantChannelListingPromotionRule],
263:     list[VariantChannelListingPromotionRule],
264:     list[VariantDiscountedPriceChange],
265: ]:

267:     discounted_variants_price: list[Money] = []
268:     variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create: list[
269:         VariantChannelListingPromotionRule
270:     ] = []

272:         VariantChannelListingPromotionRule
273:     ] = []
274:     variant_price_changes: list[VariantDiscountedPriceChange] = []
275: 
276:     for variant_listing in variant_listings:
277:         applied_discount = calculate_discounted_price_for_promotions(
278:             price=variant_listing.price,
279:             rules_info_per_variant=rules_info_per_variant,
280:             channel=channel,
281:             variant_id=variant_listing.variant_id,
282:         )
283:         discounted_variant_price = variant_listing.price
284: 
285:         rule_id = None
286:         if applied_discount:
287:             rule_id, discount = applied_discount
288:             discounted_variant_price -= discount
289:             discounted_variant_price = max(
290:                 discounted_variant_price, zero_money(discounted_variant_price.currency)
291:             )
292: 
293:             _handle_discount_rule_id(
294:                 variant_listing,
295:                 rule_id,
296:                 variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map,
297:                 discount.amount,

299:                 variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update,
300:                 variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create,
301:             )
302: 
303:         if variant_listing.discounted_price != discounted_variant_price:
304:             previous_price_amount = cast(
305:                 Decimal,
306:                 variant_listing.discounted_price_amount
307:                 if variant_listing.discounted_price_amount is not None
308:                 else variant_listing.price_amount,
309:             )
310:             variant_price_changes.append(
311:                 VariantDiscountedPriceChange(
312:                     variant_id=variant_listing.variant_id,
313:                     channel_slug=channel.slug,
314:                     previous_price_amount=previous_price_amount,
315:                     new_price_amount=discounted_variant_price.amount,
316:                     currency=channel.currency_code,
317:                 )
318:             )

320:             variant_listing.discounted_price_amount = discounted_variant_price.amount
321:             variants_listings_to_update.append(variant_listing)
322: 
323:             # delete variant listing - promotion rules relations that are not valid

325:             VariantChannelListingPromotionRule.objects.filter(
326:                 variant_channel_listing_id=variant_listing.id
327:             ).exclude(promotion_rule_id=rule_id).delete()
328: 
329:         discounted_variants_price.append(discounted_variant_price)
330: 
331:     return (
332:         discounted_variants_price,
333:         variants_listings_to_update,
334:         variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create,
335:         variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update,
336:         variant_price_changes,

340: def _handle_discount_rule_id(
341:     variant_listing: ProductVariantChannelListing,
342:     rule_id: UUID,
343:     variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map: dict,
344:     discount_amount: Decimal,
345:     currency: str,
346:     variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_update: list[VariantChannelListingPromotionRule],
347:     variant_listing_promotion_rule_to_create: list[VariantChannelListingPromotionRule],
348: ):
349:     listing_promotion_rule = variant_listing_to_listing_rule_per_rule_map[
350:         variant_listing.id
351:     ].get(rule_id)
